components.name: AdaptiveTabs
components.description: Responsive tabs component that hides overflowing tabs into a dropdown select. If only one tab fits, renders a full-width select instead.

props.name: allowNotSelected
props.description: Allows you not to specify activeTab

props.name: breakpointsConfig
props.description: Breakpoints config which control the thresholds of tab size

props.name: className
props.description: Class name for the tabs container

props.name: moreControlProps
props.description: Settings to control popup with hidden tabs list

props.name: wrapTo
props.type: (item: TabItem<T> | undefined, node: React.ReactNode, index: number | undefined) => React.ReactNode
props.description: Allows to wrap TabItem into another component or render custom tab

components.name: ChangelogDialog
components.description: Dialog component for displaying a changelog with items, loading states, and error handling.

props.name: items
props.description: List of changelog items to display

props.name: fullListLink
props.description: Link to the full changelog list

props.name: onLinkClick
props.description: Handler for link clicks within items

props.name: onRetryClick
props.description: Handler for retry button on error

props.name: onStoryClick
props.description: Handler for story clicks within items

components.name: ConfirmDialog
components.description: A simple confirmation dialog with apply/cancel buttons built on top of uikit Dialog.

components.name: CookieConsent
components.description: Cookie consent banner component supporting notification, popup, and simple consent modes via a ConsentManager.

props.name: consentManager
props.description: Consent manager instance that controls cookie consent state and mode

props.name: manageCookies
props.description: Open popup for managing cookies settings

components.name: DelayedTextInput
components.description: Controlled text input component that delays onUpdate calls by a configurable debounce period.

components.name: FormRow
components.description: Layout component for form fields with label, required indicator, help popover, and configurable direction. Has a sub-component FormRow.FieldDescription for field descriptions.

props.name: children
props.description: Field component itself. FormRow.FieldDescription could be used here next to field component itself

props.name: direction
props.description: Direction in which the elements are placed

props.name: fieldId
props.description: Id of field to correctly associate it label

props.name: labelHelpPopover
props.description: Slot for inserting HelpPopover next to label text

props.name: required
props.description: Display star next to required field

components.name: Gallery
components.description: Full-screen modal gallery component for viewing images, videos, and documents with navigation, fullscreen support, and mobile gestures.

props.name: emptyMessage
props.description: Message to display when gallery is empty

props.name: initialItemIndex
props.description: Index of the initially active item

props.name: onOpenChange
props.description: Callback when gallery open state changes

props.name: open
props.description: Whether the gallery modal is open

components.name: GalleryItem
components.description: Declarative child component for Gallery that defines a single gallery item with view, thumbnail, name, and actions.

props.name: view
props.description: Main view content for the gallery item

props.name: actions
props.description: Array of action buttons for the item

props.name: interactive
props.description: Whether the view supports user interaction (e.g., zoom)

props.name: name
props.description: Display name of the gallery item

components.name: InfiniteScroll
components.description: Infinite scroll component that triggers a callback when the bottom sentinel intersects the viewport.

props.name: onActivate
props.description: When called shows loader and waits till the promise is fulfilled to hide loader

components.name: ItemSelector
components.description: Dual-list selector component for picking items from a list, with search, sorting, and select all/deselect all functionality.

props.name: hideSelected
props.description: Hide selected items from the available list

props.name: renderItem
props.description: Custom render function for available items

props.name: renderItemValue
props.description: Custom render function for item display text

props.name: renderValueItem
props.description: Custom render function for selected items

components.name: Notification
components.description: Single notification component with title, content, source, date, actions, theming, and optional link wrapping.

props.name: notification
props.description: Notification data object containing id, content, title, source, theme, actions, etc.

components.name: NotificationAction
components.description: Action button for notifications, rendered as a flat button with optional icon and tooltip.

props.name: action
props.description: Action configuration with text, icon, onClick, href, and view

components.name: NotificationSwipeAction
components.description: Swipe action component for notifications, displayed as an icon with text and theme.

props.name: action
props.description: Click handler for the swipe action

components.name: NotificationWithSwipe
components.description: Wrapper around Notification that adds left/right swipe actions for mobile interactions.

props.name: swipeThreshold
props.description: Swipe threshold (0-1) to trigger swipe action

components.name: Notifications
components.description: Notifications center component with loading, error, and empty states, infinite scroll support, and customizable header.

props.name: notifications
props.description: Array of notification objects to display

props.name: areAllNotificationsLoaded
props.description: Whether all notifications have been loaded

props.name: swipeThreshold
props.description: Swipe threshold for notification swipe actions

components.name: OnboardingMenu
components.description: Expandable onboarding menu with progress indicator, configurable items, and collapse/complete actions. Has sub-components: OnboardingMenu.Item, OnboardingMenu.ItemText, OnboardingMenu.ItemImage.

props.name: icon
props.description: Icon displayed next to the title

props.name: liningClassName
props.description: CSS class for the items container

props.name: withCloseButton
props.description: Show close button on hover when collapsed

components.name: PromoSheet
components.description: Promotional bottom sheet with title, message, image, action button, and close functionality.

props.name: closeText
props.description: Accessible label for the close button

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS class for the sheet

props.name: contentClassName
props.description: CSS class for the content area

props.name: imageAlt
props.description: Alt text for the promo image

props.name: imageClassName
props.description: CSS class for the image element

props.name: imageContainerClassName
props.description: CSS class for the image container

components.name: Reactions
components.description: Emoji reactions component with a palette popup for adding reactions, tooltips, and customizable rendering.

props.name: reactionsState
props.description: Users' reactions with selection state and counters

props.name: addButtonPlacement
props.description: Position of the Add reaction button (deprecated, use renderReactionsContent instead)

props.name: onToggle
props.description: Callback for clicking on a reaction in the Palette or directly in the reactions list

props.name: paletteProps
props.description: Reactions palette props (columns, size, className, etc.)

props.name: popupClassName
props.description: CSS class for the reaction popup container

props.name: popupPlacement
props.description: Placement of the reactions palette popup

props.name: readOnly
props.description: Reactions readonly state when user is unable to react

props.name: renderAddReaction
props.description: Custom render function for the add reaction button

props.name: renderReaction
props.description: Custom render function for individual reaction buttons

props.name: renderReactionsContent
props.description: Custom render function for reactions layout

props.name: renderTooltip
props.description: Render tooltip content for a reaction on hover

components.name: ReactionsContainer
components.description: Flex container for rendering reactions with wrapping and gap.

components.name: SharePopover
components.description: Popover component for sharing links via social networks with copy-to-clipboard support and Web Share API integration.

props.name: autoclosable
props.description: Should close popover when cursor is outside

props.name: buttonAriaLabel
props.description: Accessible label for the share button

props.name: buttonTitle
props.description: Icon title displayed next to the share icon

props.name: closeDelay
props.description: Delay before popover hides when cursor leaves

props.name: renderCopy
props.type: ({ url, title, icon }: { url: string | undefined; title: string | React.ReactNode; icon: IconData }) => React.ReactElement

components.name: StoreBadge
components.description: Store badge component for displaying App Store and Google Play download badges with localization support.

props.name: href
props.description: URL to the app store listing

components.name: Stories
components.description: Modal carousel component for displaying stories with text, media, navigation, and cross-tab sync support.

props.name: open
props.description: Whether the stories modal is open

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS class for the modal content

props.name: disableOutsideClick
props.description: If true, do not close stories on click outside

props.name: initialStoryIndex
props.description: Index of the first story to be displayed

props.name: onClose
props.type: (event: MouseEvent | KeyboardEvent | React.MouseEvent, reason: ModalCloseReason | 'closeButtonClick') => void

props.name: onNextClick
props.description: Callback when switching to next story

props.name: onPreviousClick
props.description: Callback when switching to previous story

props.name: resetStoryIndexOnClose
props.description: Reset story index to initialStoryIndex on close

props.name: syncInTabsKey
props.description: Key for syncing story state across browser tabs

components.name: StoriesGroup
components.description: Modal component for displaying groups of stories with thumbnail previews and cross-group navigation.

props.name: groups
props.description: List of story groups to display

props.name: open
props.description: Whether the stories group modal is open

props.name: disableOutsideClick
props.description: If true, do not close on click outside

props.name: maxSliderItemsCount
props.description: Maximum number of slider preview thumbnails

props.name: onClose
props.type: (event: MouseEvent | KeyboardEvent | React.MouseEvent, reason: ModalCloseReason | 'closeButtonClick') => void

props.name: onItemSelect
props.type: (itemIndexes: [groupIndex: number, itemIndex: number], selectedFromThumbnail: boolean) => void
props.description: Callback when switching to a story

hooks.name: useDelayedValue
hooks.signature: function useDelayedValue<TValue = unknown>(value: TValue, onChange: (value: TValue) => void, delay?: number): { currentValue: TValue; delayedOnChange: (nextValue: TValue) => void }

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: External value that will be eventually replaced by user input

parameters.name: onChange
parameters.description: Function to update value param after specified delay

parameters.name: delay
parameters.description: Time to wait after last delayedOnChange invocation before onChange is called

hooks.name: useOnIntersected
hooks.signature: function useOnIntersected(element: Element | null, onIntersected: () => void, options?: IntersectionObserverInit): void

parameters.name: element
parameters.description: DOM element to observe for intersection

parameters.name: onIntersected
parameters.description: Callback fired when element intersects the viewport

hooks.name: useGalleryImageZoom
hooks.signature: function useImageZoom({ disabled, onTap }: UseImageZoomProps): UseImageZoomReturn

parameters.name: onTap
parameters.description: Tap handler for mobile, called on single tap when image is zoomed

hooks.return_type: UseImageZoomReturn (imageHandlers, setImageSize, setContainerSize, resetZoom, imageStyles, isZooming)

hooks.name: useGalleryContext
hooks.return_type: GalleryContextValue ({ onTap: React.TouchEventHandler; onViewInteractionChange: (isInteracting: boolean) => void })

hooks.name: useReactionsPopup
hooks.signature: function useReactionsPopup(reaction: ReactionState, ref: React.RefObject<HTMLButtonElement>): { onMouseEnter: React.MouseEventHandler; onMouseLeave: React.MouseEventHandler }

parameters.name: reaction
parameters.description: Reaction state object with value, selected, and counter

parameters.name: ref
parameters.description: Ref to the reaction button element for popup positioning

hooks.name: useSyncWithLS
hooks.signature: function useSyncWithLS<T extends Function>({ dataSourceName, callback, uniqueKey, disableActiveTabCallback }: UseSyncWithLSInputProps<T>): UseSyncWithLSOutputProps

parameters.name: callback
parameters.description: Callback function to sync across tabs

parameters.name: disableActiveTabCallback
parameters.description: If true, do not call callback in the active tab
